name: ProStar Holdings Inc.
summary: ProStar Geocorp, Inc. develops geospatial intelligence software. It provides Transparent Earth, a software-as-a-service solution that enables real time access to critical information where and when it is most needed, including in the office or out in the field; and PointMan, a mobile software application that enables field personnel to capture precise asset location data from a mobile device. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is based in Grand Junction, Colorado with an additional office in Boulder, Colorado.
